note: S2 Relax cycle: 43 normal attacks per stack x 20 stacks -> heal proc -> team Attack Damage 20.99% for 7s. HEAL-TRIGGERED (corrected 2026-07-14, owner): the +20.99% AD fires on 'when recovery takes effect' — i.e. whenever Crown RECEIVES a heal — NOT on a fixed self-cadence. Modeled as two blocks: (A) her own Relax self-heal every 860 hits (emits a heal event to self), and (B) a 'recovery' trigger that grants the team +20.99% AD 7s. In a healer-less team B fires ~once/26s (~27% uptime) off her own Relax; when a frequent healer is present (e.g. Helm's 0.59% full-charge heal every ~1.5s) B is refreshed to near-permanent — the previously-missing shared team buff that read the DPS supports ~15% cold in the bare control frame. Taunt/invuln portions dropped (defensive; the HEAL is NOT dropped — it is the trigger). NAMU CROSS-CHECK (2026-07-13): her S1 'One For All' actually targets DISJOINT groups - burst casters get caster-ATK 64.51% + reload 44.35%, NON-casters get caster-DEF 37.44% + reload 44.35% - so no single unit ever legitimately receives both 44.35% reload lines; the same-caster-same-slot overwrite rule fixes the parser's both-lines-to-everyone artifact and matches the real kit structure.
